scope: Chunk 2 - Phase 2 premium UI / RTL / sessions
block_reason: Browser and live LLM validation were intentionally not run during this backend test-harness fix.
root_cause: Global authenticated_client did not sync the built-in local admin before sign-in after Phase 5/6 auth/RBAC hardening.
harness_updates: Shared authenticated_client now depends on synced_local_admin.
Feedback accepted-query seed now requests ensure_db_connection.
Admin settings non-admin forbidden test uses a direct low-permission session instead of forbidden local login.
Admin settings unauthenticated PATCH includes the test Origin header so auth behavior is exercised after CSRF guard.
F-011 lifecycle tests use valid UUID inputs and async stubs for current detection/session/context/persistence dependencies.

commands.command: cd backend && rtk uv run pytest tests/acceptance/test_session_conversation.py tests/integration/test_sessions.py tests/integration/test_feedback.py tests/integration/test_admin_settings.py tests/integration/test_f011_lock_leak.py tests/contract/test_gemini_contract.py -x --tb=short

cd backend && rtk uv run pytest tests/unit/test_admin_settings_unit.py tests/unit/test_session_repository.py tests/unit/test_session_extension.py tests/unit/test_feedback_router.py tests/unit/llm/test_gemini_adapter.py tests/unit/llm/test_adapter_lifecycle.py -x --tb=short
cd backend && rtk uv run ruff check src tests
cd backend && rtk uv run ruff format --check src tests

security_privacy.notes: No browser/API smoke ran in this backend-only fix. Test evidence is summarized and sanitized.
